name: pi-repoprompt-tools-lock
description: Forces the agent to use RepoPrompt tools during repo-scoped work by disabling Pi's native tools when RepoPrompt tools are available (through either the `pi-repoprompt-cli` or `pi-repoprompt-mcp` Pi packages/extensions)

metadata.description: Forces the agent to use RepoPrompt tools during repo-scoped work by disabling Pi's native tools when RepoPrompt tools are available (through either the `pi-repoprompt-cli` or `pi-repoprompt-mcp` Pi packages/extensions)
